sync_log.summary: 5-commit incremental sync — per-agent API permissions (already documented), x-eve.cli fix trilogy (CLI metadata in jobs, auto-inject with_apis on direct job creation, auto-discover CLI services from manifest for all agent jobs), binary upload fix. CLI auto-discovery is a significant behavioral change: all agent jobs now automatically get app CLIs on PATH without explicit with_apis. CLI-first philosophy audit: strengthened guidance across agents-teams, app-cli, manifest, manifest-authoring, and fullstack-app-design. Added CLI design checklist.

0-commit incremental sync — no new eve-horizon changes since the March 20, 2026 sync. Verified the workspace mirror at .eve-horizon-src and re-ran the state-today compliance checks with no documentation updates required.

1-commit incremental sync — documented the fixed org-scoped SSO invite accept flow: GoTrue mailer links now enter via /verify, the SSO broker preserves invite redirect fallbacks, and invited users are sent through /set-password before landing in the target app.

3-commit incremental sync — documented shipped app-onboarding groundwork: org-scoped email invites, org member search permissions, and SSO invite redirect preservation via /auth/exchange. Updated auth references and the auth skill; ignored the new proposed plan as roadmap-only.

1-commit incremental sync — Cloud FS per-mount file operations added at the API layer (mount browse by path, file metadata, download, upload, folder creation). Skillpacks updated to capture the new API surface and align Cloud FS examples with the current CLI.

32-commit incremental sync — object store + org filesystem (presigned URLs, share tokens, public paths, app object stores), Codex harness fixes (auth, sandbox, streaming), CLI improvements (admin users, --version, first-experience auth, log normalization), worker image tooling (gh, jq)

33-commit incremental sync — Slack integration (gateway simulate, provider bootstrap, OAuth install, Block Kit, identity resolution, rate limiting), app SSO (@eve-horizon/auth + @eve-horizon/auth-react, eveUserAuth middleware), GitHub webhook setup, terraform-only infra policy, CLI (chat simulate gateway routing, identity link, integrations expansion, ollama pull/models)

11-commit incremental sync — Eve Auth SDK published to npm (@eve-horizon/auth), full SDK system doc (373 lines), eve-sdk overview doc, enriched user visibility (eve user show), admin membership table improvements, system health degraded-state handling. Sentinel-mgr SSO migration patterns distilled into auth skills.

20-commit incremental sync — Pi coding agent harness (Phase 1), worker org-fs parity (.org/ mount in all execution paths), Pi skill discovery, eve-worker CLI removal, ECR public auto-auth for eve local up, auth-react SSO redirect fix

120-commit incremental sync — inference simplification (BYOK, ollama/models removed), document ingestion pipeline (ingest CLI, PDF, media processing, agentpack), chat completeness (outbound delivery, progress updates, file materialization, agent aliases, staged dispatch), production hardening (8 features: dedup, retry, cost, observability), private endpoints (Tailscale), worker toolchain-on-demand, app CLI framework, Cloud FS (Google Drive), per-org OAuth (BYOA), managed DB snapshots, invoke parity (shared module), workflow event triggers, step optimization, app undeploy/delete, GCS storage
